description: Lock the 1978 renewable-power grid-integration milestone and its source-specific direct prerequisite boundary.

checks.reason: The node is anchored to PURPA's 1978 qualifying-facility framework rather than the invention date of any single generator technology.
Generic classical construction is remote infrastructure ancestry, not a technology-specific renewable-integration prerequisite.
PURPA explicitly includes hydro as a qualifying renewable small-power source.
Hydro can participate in a renewable portfolio without being mandatory in every integrated system.
The milestone is defined by integration into utility electric systems.
An electrical grid is constitutive of power-grid integration.
Solar generation remains one directly represented renewable source.
Modern wind generation remains one directly represented renewable source.
Geothermal generation remains one directly represented renewable source.
